description: One point per poly_bot rebalance health heartbeat from the production runtime.
filter: ((resource.type="gce_instance" AND jsonPayload.message=~"\"message\":\"rebalance health heartbeat\"") OR (resource.type="k8s_container" AND resource.labels.cluster_name="arb-bot" AND resource.labels.namespace_name="arb-bot" AND resource.labels.container_name="arb-bot" AND jsonPayload.fields.message="rebalance health heartbeat"))
